tool_calls.input:
{"code":"# List high-urgency, triggered PagerDuty incidents
incidents = pagerduty__list_incidents(urgency="high", status="triggered")
count = len(incidents)
ids = [inc["id"] for inc in incidents]
(f"Count: {count}\nIDs: {ids}")"}
